questions.question: When your project and a layer both provide the same component file, which one takes precedence?
options: The first entry in the extends array wins
Your project files always take precedence
Vue merges both and the last one wins

questions.question: Which key in nuxt.config.ts is used to extend from a local or npm layer?
What is the key difference between a Nuxt layer and a Nuxt module?
options: Layers run at runtime, modules run at build time
A layer is a partial Nuxt app (files); a module is a build-time plugin using @nuxt/kit
Modules can provide components but layers cannot
Layers require npm publishing; modules must be local
